name: RiverNorth/DoubleLine Strategic Opportunity Fund Inc. 6.00% Series C Term Preferred Stock (Liquidation Preference $10.00 per share)
summary: RiverNorth/DoubleLine Strategic Opportunity Fund Inc. is a closed-end management investment company that seeks to provide a high level of current income and overall return. The fund invests in a portfolio of fixed-income securities, including U.S. government securities, corporate bonds, and mortgage-backed securities and the 6.00% Series C Term Preferred Stock represents ownership in this fund. The fund is based in the United States.
